query:
SELECT
                 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST((d.detected_at / 3600000) % 24 AS INTEGER) = $2
                                   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "hour_count!: i64",
                 COUNT(*) AS "total!: i64"
               FROM detections d
               JOIN labels l ON l.id = d.label_id
               WHERE l.scientific_name = $1
                 AND d.detected_at < $3
                 AND d.confidence >= $4
